questions.question: Do you plan to lead or follow on this route?
What is the highest altitude you've spent time at, and did you experience any altitude sickness symptoms?
Have you used crampons and an ice axe before? If so, describe the terrain and conditions.
What's the heaviest pack you've carried on a multi-day trip, and for how many days?
What's the longest continuous day of hiking or climbing you've done in the last 6 months (hours moving)?
